name: Chocolate Oblivion Truffle Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in a double boiler over hot water, not simmering.
2. Add butter to the melted chocolate and melt together.
3. Heat eggs over simmering water.
4. Remove eggs from heat and beat for 10 minutes until thick.
5. Add beaten eggs to the melted chocolate mixture and fold in evenly.
6. Grease an 8-inch springform pan with waxed paper on the bottom and slightly on top.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan and smooth the surface.
8. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
9. Bake for 5 minutes, then cover the pan with aluminum foil.
10. Continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and let cool for 45 minutes, or 3 hours in the refrigerator.
12. Garnish with whipped cream and raspberry sauce, if desired.
